title: dortmanna pulchella
intro: Dortmanna pulchella, also known as the lesser dodder, is a type of parasitic flowering plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting itself to other plants. The medicinal properties of Dortmanna pulchella include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna pulchella include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues.
